parameters.query:
UPDATE assets SET screenshot_url = '{{ $json.screenshot_url || '' }}', last_tested = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $json.asset_id }}';
UPDATE scan_jobs SET status='completed', completed_at=NOW() WHERE id='{{ $json.scan_job_id }}';

INSERT INTO discovery_records (engagement_id, asset_id, source, record_type, record_value, raw_data)
VALUES ('{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.engagement_id }}','{{ $('Normalize Input').first().json.asset_id }}','screenshot','visual_capture','{{ $('Process Screenshot Result').first().json.screenshot_url || 'failed' }}','{"captured_at":"{{ $('Process Screenshot Result').first().json.captured_at }}","success":{{ $('Process Screenshot Result').first().json.success }},"storage_ref":"{{ $('Process Screenshot Result').first().json.storage_ref || '' }}"}'::jsonb);

meta.description: RECON OS WF-07: Screenshot capture for authorized web assets. Uses screenshot API (configurable). Stores reference URL and metadata. Set SCREENSHOT_API_KEY env var in n8n.
